creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: wg
Date: Sat Jul  6 11:40:31 2013
New Revision: 322386
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/322386

Log:
  sysutils/ansible: update to 1.2.1
  
  - Update to 1.2.1
  
  Changes: https://github.com/ansible/ansible/blob/release1.2.1/CHANGELOG.md
  
  PR:		ports/180312
  Submitted by:	Nikolai Lifanov <lifanov mail.lifanov.com> (maintainer)

Modified:
  head/sysutils/ansible/Makefile
  head/sysutils/ansible/distinfo
  head/sysutils/ansible/pkg-plist

Modified: head/sysutils/ansible/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/sysutils/ansible/Makefile	Sat Jul  6 11:29:18 2013	(r322385)
+++ head/sysutils/ansible/Makefile	Sat Jul  6 11:40:31 2013	(r322386)
@@ -1,7 +1,7 @@
 # $FreeBSD$
 
 PORTNAME=	ansible
-PORTVERSION=	1.2
+PORTVERSION=	1.2.1
 CATEGORIES=	sysutils python
 MASTER_SITES=	http://ansibleworks.com/releases/
 
@@ -50,10 +50,8 @@ pre-install-script:
 
 post-install:
 	@${MKDIR} ${MAN1PREFIX}/man/man1
-.for man in ansible-doc ansible-playbook ansible-pull ansible
-	${INSTALL_MAN} ${WRKSRC}/docs/man/man1/${man}.1 \
+	${INSTALL_MAN} ${MAN1:S,^,${WRKSRC}/docs/man/man1/,} \
 		${MAN1PREFIX}/man/man1
-.endfor
 
 .if ${PORT_OPTIONS:MEXAMPLES}
 	@${MKDIR} ${EXAMPLESDIR}

==============================================================================
